display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Optimization Parameters
─────────────────
RANDOM_SEED: 42
GRID_RESOLUTION: 30
BATCH_SIZE: 32
BETA_SCORE: 0.5
N_BOOTSTRAP: 1000
CONFIDENCE_LEVEL: 0.95

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Economic Cost Model
─────────────────
LLM_COST_PER_TOKEN: $0.00002
(GPT-4 Turbo pricing)
─────────────────
ERROR_COST_PER_TOKEN: $0.001
(GDPR violation penalty)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Grid Definition
─────────────────
entropy_range: linspace(0.1, 1.5, 30)
confidence_range: linspace(0.5, 0.99, 30)
─────────────────
Total: 30 × 30 = 900 combinations

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Load Model
─────────────────
AutoModelForTokenClassification
from models/mdeberta-pii-safe/final
─────────────────
device: cuda / cpu

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Load Dataset
─────────────────
load_from_disk()
Validation split
─────────────────
Shuffle with seed=42

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
collect_inference_stats_batched()
─────────────────
For each batch (size=32):
1. Pad sequences to max_len
2. Create attention_mask
3. Forward pass → logits
4. Compute softmax probabilities
5. Calculate entropy: -Σ(p × log(p))
6. Extract confidence: max(probs)
7. Compare pred_id vs true_label

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Collected Statistics
─────────────────
entropies: float[] (N samples)
confidences: float[] (N samples)
is_errors: bool[] (N samples)
─────────────────
N = total_tokens across dataset

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
For each (ent_th, conf_th) in Grid
─────────────────
trigger_mask = (entropies > ent_th) &
(confidences < conf_th)
─────────────────
Identifies tokens that would
be routed to LLM

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Compute Confusion Matrix
─────────────────
TP = Σ(trigger & is_error)
FP = Σ(trigger & ~is_error)
FN = Σ(~trigger & is_error)
TN = Σ(~trigger & ~is_error)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Calculate Metrics
─────────────────
precision = TP / (TP + FP)
recall = TP / (TP + FN)
specificity = TN / (TN + FP)
intervention_rate = Σ(trigger) / N

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
F-beta Score (β=0.5)
─────────────────
Precision-weighted F-score:
F₀.₅ = (1 + β²) × (P × R) / (β² × P + R)
─────────────────
β=0.5 → 2× weight on precision
Minimizes false positives

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Expected Cost Calculation
─────────────────
n_llm_calls = rate × N
n_missed_errors = (1 - recall) × n_errors
─────────────────
llm_cost = n_llm_calls × $0.00002
error_cost = n_missed_errors × $0.001
─────────────────
total_cost = llm_cost + error_cost

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
f_score[i,j]
F₀.₅ surface

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
precision[i,j]
Precision surface

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
recall[i,j]
Recall surface

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
expected_cost[i,j]
Cost surface

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
specificity[i,j]
Specificity surface

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Find Maximum F-score
─────────────────
best_idx = argmax(f_score)
best_i, best_j = unravel_index(best_idx)
─────────────────
Optimal thresholds:
entropy = 0.583
confidence = 0.787

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Bootstrap Confidence Intervals
─────────────────
bootstrap_metric(trigger_mask, is_errors, metric_fn)
─────────────────
For n=1000 resamples:
1. Sample indices with replacement
2. Compute metric on sample
3. Collect distribution
─────────────────
CI = [percentile(2.5), percentile(97.5)]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
95% Confidence Intervals
─────────────────
precision: X.XXX [CI_low, CI_high]
recall: X.XXX [CI_low, CI_high]
f_score: X.XXX [CI_low, CI_high]

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Extract Pareto-Optimal Points
─────────────────
Algorithm:
1. Sort all points by recall DESC
2. Track max_precision seen
3. Point is Pareto-optimal if:
precision > max_precision_so_far
─────────────────
No point dominates another on
both precision AND recall

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pareto Frontier
─────────────────
Trade-off curve showing:
• High precision, low recall options
• Balanced options
• High recall, low precision options
─────────────────
User selects based on use case

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
OptimizationResult (dataclass)
─────────────────
ent_threshold: 0.583
conf_threshold: 0.787
precision: X.XXX
recall: X.XXX
f_score: X.XXX
precision_ci: (low, high)
recall_ci: (low, high)
f_score_ci: (low, high)
intervention_rate: X.XX%
expected_cost: $X.XX
cost_savings: $X.XX
tp, fp, fn, tn: int

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Heatmap Visualizations
─────────────────
plot_optimization_heatmap():

• opt_precision_heatmap.png
• opt_cost_heatmap.png
─────────────────
Red star marks optimal point

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pareto Frontier Plot
─────────────────
pareto_frontier.png
• Scatter of all configurations
• Pareto-optimal curve highlighted
• F-score iso-lines

─────────────────

Machine-readable for downstream
